GreenhouseId.name: greenhouse_id
GreenhouseId.description: Site-unique greenhouse identity; the same slug used in MQTT topics and DB rows (RFC-007).

ZoneId.name: zone_id
ZoneId.description: Irrigation-zone identity, unique within the greenhouse.

ZoneIdQuery.name: zone_id
ZoneIdQuery.description: Selects the zone for a per-zone resource: which zone's irrigation_valve override to clear, or which zone's soil_moisture injection to clear.

Metric.name: metric
Metric.description: Which sensor metric to inject on the simulated HAL (simulation-only surface).
